generic.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
generic.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later
generic.not_found: The requested resource was not found
generic.route_not_found: The requested endpoint does not exist
generic.bad_request: Invalid request. Please check your input
generic.validation_error: Validation failed. Please check the provided data

auth.user_not_found: No account found with the provided credentials
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again
auth.password_reset_sent: Password reset instructions sent to your email
auth.otp_sent: OTP sent to your registered email
auth.otp_expired: OTP has expired. Please request a new one
auth.setup_token_expired: Setup link has expired. Please contact your administrator
auth.account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact your administrator
auth.password_already_set: Password has already been set. Please use login or reset password
auth.no_setup_token: No setup token found. Please contact your administrator
auth.setup_link_resent: A new setup link has been sent to your email
auth.password_not_set: Your account has not been activated yet. Please check your email for the setup link to set your password
auth.password_reused: New password cannot be the same as your last 5 passwords
auth.account_locked: Account locked. Please contact your administrator
auth.role_inactive: Your assigned role is inactive. Please contact your administrator

client.already_exists: Organisation with this name already exists
client.db_connection_failed: Failed to connect to the database with the provided credentials. Please verify and try again
client.master_db_refreshed: Master database schema refreshed successfully. New entities and columns are now available

system_admin.already_exists_email: System admin with this email already exists
system_admin.already_exists_username: System admin with this username already exists

system_admin.cannot_modify_default: Default system admin cannot be modified

email.welcome_body: Your account has been created on {{organisation}}. Click the button below to set your password and activate your account.
email.expiry_notice: This link will expire in {{setupTokenExpiryHours}} hours. If you did not expect this email, please contact your administrator.
email.reset_otp_body: We received a request to reset your password. Use the OTP below to proceed.
email.reset_success_body: Hi {{fullName}}, your password has been reset successfully.
email.password_set_body: Hi {{fullName}}, your password has been set and your account is now active. You can sign in any time.
email.password_changed_body: Hi {{fullName}}, your account password was changed.
email.not_you_otp_body: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email — your password stays the same. Do not share this OTP with anyone.
email.not_you_success_body: If you did not perform this action, your account may be compromised. Contact your administrator immediately.
email.support_contact: Questions? Reach us at {{supportEmail}}.
